---
title: "master_thesis_site_deepdive"
author: "Savannah K. Miller"
date: "2026-06-22"
output: html_document
---

```{r, working directory and packages}



# data import and database management 
# reading files, reshaping data, and efficient data handling 

#######################################################

library(readxl) # import excel spreadsheets
library(data.table) #quick manipulation of large datasets
library(stringr) # text and string processing 
library(lubridate) # data and time handling 
library(writexl) # exports editted databases into excel files

#######################################################

# General data science workflow 
# Collection of packages for data manipulation and plotting

#######################################################

library(tidyverse)

#######################################################

#Statistical analyses and mixed models 
# Hypothesis testing, summaries, and model fitting 

#######################################################

library(gt) # displaying formatted tables for statistics 
library(rstatix) # statistical tests and assumption checking
library(lmerTest) # p-values and tests for lme4 models 
library(lme4) # linear and generalized mixed-effects models
library(ggeffects) # predicted values and marginal effects 

#######################################################

# Data visualization 
# Plot creation, figure assembly, and publication formatting 

#######################################################

library(patchwork) #combine ggplots into multi-panel figures
library(cowplot) # figure arrangement and plot annotations
library(rcartocolor) # color palettes
library(ggh4x) # advanced ggplot extensions
library(scales) # axis labels, formatting, and scaling 
library(ggridges)

#######################################################
# Spatial data and mapping 
# GIS data handling and map visualization
#######################################################

library(sf) #spatial vector data
library(ggmap) #basemaps and geographic visualization
library(ggspatial) #spatial annotations and map elements
library(leaflet) #interactive web maps

#######################################################

#Tables and report outputs 
# Interactive tables and report presentation 

#######################################################

library(reactable) #interactive tables for reports

#######################################################
# R markdown and document rendering 
# PDF generation and LaTeX support 
#######################################################

library(tinytex) #LaTeX engine for PDF knitting
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r, load the datasheet}

master_thesis = readr::write_csv(sed_thesis, "C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\master_thesis.csv")

str(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field)
head(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field, 10)
sum(is.na(master_thesis$Date.placed.in.field))



```


```{r, site C}


# Filter to just Corte Madera first
cm_data <- master_thesis %>%
  filter(Site == "CorteMadera")

cm_data <- cm_data %>%
  mutate(
    Study.Phase = factor(
      Study.Phase,
      levels = str_sort(unique(Study.Phase), numeric = TRUE)
    )
  )

cm_data$Dist <- as.numeric(levels(cm_data$Dist))[cm_data$Dist]
  
cm_data$Date.removed.from.field <- as.Date(cm_data$Date.removed.from.field, format = "%Y-%m-%d")

# Summarize by Transect and Date.removed.from.field instead of by Site
cm_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Date.removed.from.field
  ) %>%
summarise(
  mean_flux = mean(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE),
  se_flux = sd(Flux[Flux >= 0], na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(Flux >= 0, na.rm = TRUE)),
  .groups = "drop"
)

ggplot(
  cm_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = unique(cm_summary$Date.removed.from.field),
    date_labels = "%b %d",
    guide = guide_axis(n.dodge = 2)
  ) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank()
  ) +  
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = "Date Removed from Field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    caption = "Error bars represent ± 1 standard error of the mean"
  )

```


```{r}


cm_raincloud = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Date.removed.from.field,
    fill = Date.removed.from.field
  )
) +  
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Date removed from Field"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, NA))
cm_raincloud

cmraincloud_tran = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = Flux,
    y = Study.Phase,
    fill = Study.Phase
  )
) +
  geom_density_ridges(alpha = 0.7, scale = 1.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  theme_ridges() +
  labs(
    title = "Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Study Phase"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 125))
cmraincloud_tran
```

```{r}

# Standard caption for plots containing error bars
se_caption <- paste(
  "Points represent transect-level mean flux.",
  "Error bars represent +/- 1 standard error calculated from observations within each transect."
)

# Common theme
flux_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 10,
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 8)
    ),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

# basic

basic_fluxcm <- ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(x = Flux)
) +
  geom_histogram(
    bins = 30,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  flux_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Flux Distribution by Transect at Corte Madera",
    x = expression(Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = "Count"
  )

basic_fluxcm

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\basic_fluxcm_c.png"),
  plot = basic_fluxcm,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time 

removal_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Date.removed.from.field) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_time_c <- ggplot(
  removal_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 2,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 3),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 3)
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = sort(unique(removal_summary$Date.removed.from.field)),
    date_labels = "%b %d\n%Y",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 30)) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      vjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux Through Time by Transect at Corte Madera",
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Date removed from field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_time_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_time_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_time_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by Phen_Period 

hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Phen_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_hydro_c <- ggplot(
  hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Phen_Period,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.15,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.65)
  ) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 30,
      hjust = 1
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Hydrologic Period and Transect at Corte Madera",
    x = "Hydrologic Period",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_hydro_c

meanflux_time_c2 <- ggplot(
  removal_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 2,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = sort(unique(removal_summary$Date.removed.from.field)),
    date_labels = "%b %d\n%Y",
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.03, 0.03))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 30)) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(
      angle = 45,
      hjust = 1,
      size = 8
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux Through Time by Transect at Corte Madera",
    subtitle = "Negative flux values set to zero",
    x = "Date removed from field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_time_c2

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_hydro_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_hydro_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)



# flux by distance 

dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_dist_c <- ggplot(
  dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(dist_summary$Dist_numeric))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 9.5)) +
  flux_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Mean Flux by Distance and Transect at Corte Madera",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

meanflux_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux by z_star

z_summary <- cm_elev %>%
  group_by(Tran, z_star) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

meanflux_z_c <- ggplot(
  z_summary,
  aes(
    x = mean_flux,
    y = z_star,
    color = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(
      xmin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      xmax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    height = 0.01,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    n.breaks = 8
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = expression("Mean Flux by "*z^"*"*" and Transect at Corte Madera"),
    x = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    y = expression(z^"*"),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = paste(
      "Points represent mean flux within each transect and z* value.",
      "Horizontal error bars represent +/- 1 standard error."
    )
  )

meanflux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# raw flux by z star

flux_z_c = ggplot(cm_elev,
       aes(x = z_star,
           y = Flux,
           color = Tran)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "lm",
    se = FALSE
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

flux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# raw flux with z as a GAM ( )

flux_z_c_gam = ggplot(cm_elev,
       aes(x = z_star,
           y = Flux)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Tran),
             size = 3,
             alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(
    method = "gam",
    formula = y ~ s(x),
    color = "black"
  )

flux_z_c_gam

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c_gam,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)


# flux by distance and hydro

dist_hydro_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist, Phen_Period) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

flux_dist_hydro_c <- ggplot(
  dist_hydro_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = factor(Tran)
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 3,
    position = position_dodge(width = 1.5)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Phen_Period) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(dist_hydro_summary$Dist_numeric))
  ) +
  flux_theme +
  labs(
    title = "Flux by Distance, Hydrologic Period, and Transect",
    subtitle = "Corte Madera",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect",
    caption = se_caption
  )

flux_dist_hydro_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_dist_hydro_c.png"),
  plot = flux_dist_hydro_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time by distance 

time_dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Dist, Date.removed.from.field) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
 mutate(
    Date_plot = factor(
      format(Date.removed.from.field, "%b %Y"),
      levels = format(sort(unique(Date.removed.from.field)), "%b %Y")
    )
 )

time_dist_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(
    Tran,
    Dist,
    Date.removed.from.field
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    n_flux = sum(!is.na(Flux)),
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = if_else(
      n_flux > 1,
      sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n_flux),
      NA_real_
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Date_plot = factor(
      format(Date.removed.from.field, "%b %d, %Y"),
      levels = format(
        sort(unique(Date.removed.from.field)),
        "%b %d, %Y"
      )
    )
  )

flux_dist_gradient_c <- ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Dist,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Date_plot
  )
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 1.2,
    linewidth = 0.6,
    position = position_dodge(width = 2),
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = Date_plot),
    size = 3.5,
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.4,
    position = position_dodge(width = 2)
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(
    option = "D",
    end = 0.85
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(
    option = "D",
    end = 0.85
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(time_dist_summary$Dist_numeric)),
    limits = c(-2, 52)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  flux_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.width = unit(1.1, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2),
    fill = guide_legend(nrow = 2)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Flux at Discrete Marsh-Edge Sampling Points",
    subtitle = "Corte Madera; seven sampling distances across 50 m",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Collection date",
    fill = "Collection date",
    caption = se_caption
  )

flux_dist_gradient_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_dist_gradient_c.png"),
  plot = flux_dist_gradient_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# heat map and distance
flux_heatmap_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = Dist,
    fill = mean_flux
  )
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(mean_flux, 1)),
    color = "white",
    size = 5,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "magma", name = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Heatmap: Study Phase x Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Date removed from Field",
    y = "Distance from Marsh Edge"
  )
flux_heatmap_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_heatmap_c.png"),
  plot = flux_heatmap_c,
  width = 12,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# flux through time by transect 

tran_summary <- cm_data %>%
  group_by(Tran, Date.removed.from.field) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_flux = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_flux = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

flux_tran_time_c = ggplot(
  tran_summary,
  aes(
    x = Date.removed.from.field,
    y = mean_flux,
    color = Tran,
    group = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) + 
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,30)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Flux Through Time by Transect at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Date removed from field",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2)),
    color = "Transect"
  )
flux_tran_time_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_tran_time_c.png"),
  plot = flux_tran_time_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)


# raw flux and distance 

rawflux_dist_c = ggplot(
  cm_data,
  aes(
    x = as.numeric(as.character(Dist)),
    y = Flux
  )
) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,120)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Raw Flux vs Distance at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
  )
rawflux_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\rawflux_dist_c.png"),
  plot = rawflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# elev and flux

flux_elev_c = ggplot(cm_elev,
   aes(
     x = Elevation_m,
     y = Flux
   )
 ) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
   labs(
     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
     x = "Elevation_m",
     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
   )

flux_elev_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_elev_c.png"),
  plot = flux_elev_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# z star and flux

flux_z_c = ggplot(
  cm_elev,
   aes(
     x = z_star,
     y = Flux
   )
 ) +
   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
   labs(
     title = paste("Flux vs Elevation at", "Corte Madera"),
     x = "z_star",
     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
   )

flux_z_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\flux_z_c.png"),
  plot = flux_z_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

# once veg is cleaned and entered 

# one_site <- one_site %>%
#   mutate(
#     Veg_Structure = Percent_Cover * Avg_Height
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Percent_Cover,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Percent Cover at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Percent Vegetation Cover",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
#   )

# ggplot(
#   one_site,
#   aes(
#     x = Veg_Structure,
#     y = Flux
#   )
# ) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
#   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
#   theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
#   labs(
#     title = paste("Flux vs Vegetation Structure at", "Corte Madera"),
#     x = "Vegetation Structure Index (Cover x Height)",
#     y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))
#   )
```


```{r, corte madera profile}
# Step 1: Create numeric distance, then average elevation across the 3 replicates within each Transect x Distance
elevation_profile <- cm_elev %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist))) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_elevation = mean(Elevation_m, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_elevation = sd(Elevation_m, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Step 2: Plot
elevation_profile_c = ggplot(
  elevation_profile,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_elevation,
    color = Tran,
    fill = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_elevation - se_elevation,
      ymax = mean_elevation + se_elevation
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(elevation_profile$Dist_numeric))) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Marsh Surface Elevation Profile at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Mean elevation \u00b1 SE across 3 replicates per sampling area",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Elevation (m)",
    color = "Transect",
    fill = "Transect"
  )
elevation_profile_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\elevation_profile_c.png"),
  plot = elevation_profile_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)




# for z star accounting 

zstar_profile <- cm_elev %>%
  mutate(Dist_numeric = as.numeric(as.character(Dist))) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Dist_numeric) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_zstar = mean(z_star, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_zstar = sd(z_star, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

zstar_profile_c = ggplot(
  zstar_profile,
  aes(
    x = Dist_numeric,
    y = mean_zstar,
    color = Tran,
    fill = Tran
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_zstar - se_zstar,
      ymax = mean_zstar + se_zstar
    ),
    width = 1,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "D", end = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = sort(unique(zstar_profile$Dist_numeric))) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 10) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Relative Tidal Elevation (Z*) Profile at", "Corte Madera"),
    subtitle = "Mean Z* \u00b1 SE across 3 replicates per sampling area",
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = "Z* (Relative Tidal Elevation)",
    color = "Transect",
    fill = "Transect"
  )
zstar_profile_c

ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\zstar_profile_c.png"),
  plot = zstar_profile_c,
  width = 14,
  height = 9,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```


```{r, more detailed plots for time and space}
# mean flux per distance (study phase-time)

meanflux_dist_sp_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(x = Dist, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Study.Phase) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,9.5)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Corte Madera Per Study Phase"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_dist_sp_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_dist_sp_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_sp_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

#mean flux per study phase (distance)

meanflux_sp_dist_c = ggplot(
  time_dist_summary,
  aes(x = Study.Phase, y = mean_flux, group = 1)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = mean_flux - se_flux,
      ymax = mean_flux + se_flux
    ),
    width = 0.2
  ) +
   facet_wrap(~Dist) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,9.5)) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Mean Flux by Distance from Marsh Edge at", "Corte Madera"),
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)",
    y = expression(Mean~Flux~(g/m^2))
  )

meanflux_sp_dist_c

# Save the high-res image
ggsave(("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\images\\meanflux_sp_dist_c.png"),
  plot = meanflux_dist_c,
  width = 10,  
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```
```{r, data flags}

flag_cols <- c("Filter_Num", "RB_Num", "Flood_Obsv", "Bio_Obsv", "Drop_Obsv", "OpenBag_Obsv", "Position_Obsv", "DryTime_Obsv", "NegValue_Num")

long_cm <- cm_data %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(flag_cols), 
    names_to = "Flag_Type", 
    values_to = "Flag_Value"
  )

#making a flag database

flagged_cm <- long_cm %>%
  filter(Flag_Value == 1) %>%
  mutate(Flag_Type = factor(Flag_Type, levels = flag_cols))

# consistent color palette across all plots 

flag_colors <-setNames(
  scales::hue_pal()(length(flag_cols)), 
  flag_cols
)

#plot the flags 

flag_summary_cm <- flagged_cm %>%
  group_by(Dist, Flag_Type) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

flag_summary_cm_time <- flagged_cm %>%
  group_by(Date.removed.from.field, Flag_Type) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

cm_total_flags <- ggplot(flag_summary_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = n, fill = Flag_Type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(
    title = "Flag Occurrences by Distance", 
    x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)", 
    y = "Count", 
    fill = "Flage Type"
  )

cm_total_flags

cm_total_flags_time <- ggplot(flag_summary_cm_time, aes(x = Date.removed.from.field, y = n, fill = Flag_Type)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(
    title = "Flag Occurrences by Time", 
    x = "Study.Phase", 
    y = "Count", 
    fill = "Flage Type"
  )

cm_total_flags_time

```

```{r}
cm_z_flux_long <- long_cm |>
  left_join(
    cm_elev |>
      select(
        Site,
        Tran,
        Dist,
        Replicate,
        z_star
      ),
    by = c("Site", "Tran", "Dist", "Replicate"),
    relationship = "many-to-one"
  )
```



```{r, claude suggested flag visualizations}

#############################################################
# QC FLAG VISUALIZATIONS
# Sediment deposition / flux data by transect
# Assumes flux_data already has a `flag_status` column built
# per the case_when() logic from earlier (single "worst flag"
# per observation), plus: transect, distance_from_edge_m,
# elevation_z_star, hydrologic_period, date_collected, flux
#############################################################

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# ---- Shared color palette (reuse everywhere for consistency) ----
flag_colors <- c(
  # ----- Field Issues -----
  "Flood/Ponding"                = "#2C7FB8",  # blue
  "Position Changed"             = "#41B6C4",  # teal
  "Biological Matter"            = "#238B45",  # green
  "Filter Issues"                = "#66A61E",  # sage green
  "Rubber Band Issues"           = "#B2DF8A",  # light olive
  "Recorded Drop in Field/Lab"   = "#1F9E89",  # turquoise

  # ----- Laboratory Issues -----
  "Open Ziploc Bag Observed"        = "#CC79A7",  # magenta
  "Multiple Drying Times Needed"    = "#E69F00",  # orange
  "Negative Flux Values Calculated" = "#4D4D4D"   # charcoal
)

flag_levels <- names(flag_colors)

flagged_long <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  mutate(flag_status = factor(flag_status, levels = flag_levels))


#############################################################
# 1. SMALL MULTIPLES: flag type x hydrologic period
#    (swap facet variable for day_collected version below)
#############################################################

# Count of each flag type within each hydrologic period x transect
flag_counts_period <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  count(Tran, Phen_Period, flag_status, name = "n")

ggplot(flag_counts_period, aes(x = flag_status, y = n, fill = flag_status)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors, guide = "none") +
  facet_grid(Phen_Period ~ Tran) +
  labs(title = "Flag Frequency by Hydrologic Period and Transect",
       x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

# ---- Day-collected version ----
# If you want actual calendar days (not just period), bin by date
flag_counts_day <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  mutate(day_collected = as_date(Date.removed.from.field.x)) %>%
  count(Tran, Date.removed.from.field.x, flag_status, name = "n")

ggplot(flag_counts_day, aes(x = flag_status, y = n, fill = flag_status)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors, guide = "none") +
  facet_grid(Date.removed.from.field ~ Tran) +   # can get tall w/ many dates
  labs(title = "Flag Frequency by Sampling Day and Transect",
       x = NULL, y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 6),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 6, angle = 0))

# NOTE: if you have many unique dates, facet_grid gets unwieldy.
# Consider facet_wrap(~ day_collected, ncol = 5) instead, or bin
# dates into weeks: mutate(week = floor_date(date_collected, "week"))


#############################################################
# 2. BOXPLOT: flux by flag status, faceted by transect
#############################################################

ggplot(cm_z_flux_long, aes(x = flag_status, y = Flux, fill = flag_status)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha = 0.4, width = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.25, size = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors, guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  labs(title = "Flux Distribution by Flag Status",
       subtitle = "Faceted by transect",
       x = NULL, y = expression(Flux~(g/m^2))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


#############################################################
# 3. SCATTER: elevation (z*) vs distance from edge, colored by flag
#    "gray-out-the-good-data" approach for clarity
#############################################################

ggplot(cm_z_flux_long, aes(x = Dist, y = z_star)) +
  geom_point(data = filter(cm_z_flux_long, flag_status == "Passed QC"),
             color = "grey85", alpha = 0.5, size = 1.8) +
  geom_point(data = filter(cm_z_flux_long, flag_status != "Passed QC"),
             aes(color = flag_status), size = 2.3, alpha = 0.9) +
  scale_color_manual(values = flag_colors, name = "QC Flag") +
  facet_wrap(~ Tran) +
  labs(title = "Elevation (z*) vs. Distance from Marsh Edge",
       subtitle = "Flagged observations highlighted",
       x = "Distance from Marsh Edge (m)", y = "Elevation (z*)") +
  theme_minimal()


#############################################################
# 4. TIMELINE / CALENDAR STRIP: date x transect, fill = flag
#############################################################

flux_data <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  mutate(day_collected = as_date(Date.removed.from.field))

ggplot(cm_z_flux_long, aes(x = Date.removed.from.field, y = Tran, fill = flag_status)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", height = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors, name = "QC Flag") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
  labs(title = "QC Flag Timeline by Transect",
       x = "Date Collected", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())

# If multiple observations share a transect+date (e.g. several
# sampling points per day), geom_tile will just take the last
# value plotted. To show flag *proportions* per day instead:

flag_props_day <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  count(Tran, Date.removed.from.field, flag_status) %>%
  group_by(Tran, Date.placed.in.field.x) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(flag_props_day, aes(x = Date.removed.from.field, y = Tran, fill = flag_status, alpha = prop)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = flag_colors, name = "QC Flag") +
  scale_alpha(range = c(0.3, 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
  labs(title = "QC Flag Proportions by Day and Transect",
       x = "Date Collected", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())


#############################################################
# 5. FLAG CO-OCCURRENCE (requires boolean flag columns, not
#    the collapsed "worst flag" version — use your wide data
#    e.g. flag_negative, flag_sensor_drift, flag_outlier,
#    flag_field_note as TRUE/FALSE columns)
#############################################################

# --- Option A: simple co-occurrence heatmap (flag x flag matrix) ---
flag_cols <- c("flag_negative", "flag_sensor_drift",
               "flag_outlier", "flag_field_note")

flag_matrix <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  select(all_of(flag_cols)) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), as.numeric)) %>%
  as.matrix()

co_occurrence <- t(flag_matrix) %*% flag_matrix   # crossproduct = co-occurrence counts

co_occurrence_df <- as.data.frame(co_occurrence) %>%
  rownames_to_column("flag_1") %>%
  pivot_longer(-flag_1, names_to = "flag_2", values_to = "n")

ggplot(co_occurrence_df, aes(x = flag_1, y = flag_2, fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey95", high = "#7570b3", name = "Co-occurrences") +
  labs(title = "Flag Co-occurrence Matrix",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# --- Option B: UpSet-style plot (better for >3 flag types) ---
# install.packages("ggupset")  # if not already installed
library(ggupset)

upset_data <- cm_z_flux_long %>%
  select(all_of(flag_cols)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(flags_present = list(flag_cols[c_across(everything())])) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(upset_data, aes(x = flags_present)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "#7570b3") +
  scale_x_upset(order_by = "freq") +
  labs(title = "Flag Co-occurrence (UpSet Plot)",
       x = NULL, y = "Number of Observations") +
  theme_minimal()

#############################################################
# END
#############################################################


```
